description_long: This is a classic-style blue scooter with a streamlined body and a prominent black seat designed for one or two riders. The scooter features a rounded front shield with a headlight mounted at the top center, flanked by two black handlebar grips. The bodywork is smooth and curvaceous, with side panels that cover the engine and rear wheel, and subtle vent details on the sides. The wheels are relatively small, with the front wheel partially covered by a fender and the rear wheel mostly enclosed by the body. The scooter also includes a center stand for parking stability and a rear light assembly integrated into the tail section.
description: A classic blue scooter with a black seat, rounded bodywork, and a front-mounted headlight. It features small wheels, side vents, and a streamlined, retro design.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the black seat, rear light, and side vent details on the blue bodywork.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the scooter, the black seat, and the front fender with the headlight visible.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the headlight, handlebars, front fender, and the scooter's narrow profile.
description_view_3: Rear side view focusing on the seat, rear wheel enclosure, and the side vent details.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, slightly curved, wide enough for two feet, smooth surface with no visible patterns
attribute_brand_logo: There is a faint script-style text on the front shield, possibly a brand name, but it is not clearly legible.
